info.name: Asella Organic — Full E2E Test Suite v4
info.description: Complete E2E test suite matched to migrations 001–004. Tests: data persistence, inventory triggers, commission triggers, role-based access, concurrent updates, and validation. Run in order — variables chain between requests.

exec: pm.test("Has Moringa Powder",      () => pm.expect(j.data.some(p => p.name === "Moringa Powder")).to.be.true);
pm.test("Has Black Seed Oil",      () => pm.expect(j.data.some(p => p.name === "Black Seed Oil")).to.be.true);
pm.test("Name is Moringa Powder",   () => pm.expect(p.name).to.equal("Moringa Powder"));
pm.test("Each has quantity_after", () => pm.expect(j.data.every(m => m.quantity_after !== undefined)).to.be.true);
pm.test("Moringa Capsules in list",   () => pm.expect(j.data.some(p => p.name === "Moringa Capsules")).to.be.true);
pm.test("stock_status on each item",  () => pm.expect(j.data.every(p => p.stock_status)).to.be.true);
pm.test("All qty <= threshold",       () => pm.expect(j.data.every(p => p.inventory_quantity <= p.low_stock_threshold)).to.be.true);

item.name: Black Seed Oil inventory reduced after deliveries ✅
Create order for inventory deduction test ✅

exec: pm.test("Sale movement for our order", () => pm.expect(j.data.some(m => m.reference_id === inv_order && m.movement_type === "sale")).to.be.true);
pm.test("Change amount is -3",     () => pm.expect(j.data.some(m => m.reference_id === inv_order && m.change_amount === -3)).to.be.true);
if (!id) { pm.test("SKIP — no commission_id set", () => true); }
if (!id) { pm.test("SKIP — no commission_id set", () => true); }
if (ref_order) { pm.test("Commission for referred order exists", () => pm.expect(j.data.some(c => c.order_id === ref_order)).to.be.true); }

item.name: Delivery role CANNOT see referral stats ❌ (403)
Brute force — 6th attempt triggers rate limit

exec: // Informational only — rate limiting fires after 10 attempts/5min
// Run with: newman run ... --iteration-count 12 to properly trigger 429

item.name: DB state is consistent after concurrent updates ✅

exec: pm.test("Order is in valid state", () => pm.expect(["Pending","Processing","Out for Delivery","Delivered","Cancelled"]).to.include(j.status));
pm.test("No duplicate history",    () => { const statuses = j.history.map(h => h.new_status + h.created_at); const unique = new Set(statuses); pm.expect(unique.size).to.equal(statuses.length); });
pm.test("No server error on concurrent stock", () => pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.not.equal(500));
pm.test("No server error on concurrent stock", () => pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.not.equal(500));

item.name: Stock movements consistent — no phantom entries ✅

exec: pm.test("No duplicate movement IDs",   () => { const ids = j.data.map(m => m.id); pm.expect(new Set(ids).size).to.equal(ids.length); });
